label: radian
source: SI Brochure 9th ed. (BIPM 2019), Tables 2 & 4; affine/scaled factors re-derived from the brochure, never copied from QUDT (documented QUDT factor errors: Keil & Schindler 2018)
notes: Coherent unit of a dimensionless quantity kind (rad = m/m).
